items.summary: Debug and fix the runtime error causing a white screen on load. Audit App.tsx, CartContext.tsx, CartPanel.tsx, CheckoutModal.tsx, and CartIcon.tsx for any JavaScript/TypeScript errors such as: missing or incorrect CartProvider wrapping in the component tree, context being consumed outside its provider, invalid destructuring of context values, missing default values in CartContext, import/export mismatches, or any unhandled exceptions during initial render. Ensure CartProvider wraps all components that consume CartContext in App.tsx or main.tsx (without modifying main.tsx or other immutable files). Add a fallback default context value so the app does not crash if context is accessed before the provider mounts.
